name: sed
description: Stream editor for filtering and transforming text, commonly used for find-and-replace operations

options.label: In-place editing
options.description: Edit files in place, modifying the original file directly instead of printing to stdout

options.label: Extended regex
options.description: Use extended regular expressions for more powerful pattern matching

positionalArgs.label: Expression
positionalArgs.description: The sed expression to apply (e.g., 's/old/new/g' for global substitution)

positionalArgs.label: Files
positionalArgs.description: Input files to process (reads from stdin if omitted)

examples.label: Replace all occurrences of a word in a file
Replace using extended regex with capture groups
Find and replace in-place across multiple files
Delete lines matching a pattern in-place
Replace version number using extended regex
